title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 211.431 - Violation of law, class A misdemeanor
text:
211.431.  Violation of law, class A misdemeanor. — Any person eighteen years of age or over who willfully violates, neglects or refuses to obey or perform any lawful order of the court, or who violates any provision of this chapter is guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1957 p. 642 § 211.410, A.L. 1982 S.B. 497, A.L. 2018 S.B. 793 merged with S.B. 800) 
Effective 1-01-21
